summary: Iteration 44: Major Architectural Refactoring - All tests passed. Backend 23/23. Frontend all 9 feature areas verified: Website sidebar Payments tab (Integrations removed), Payments section with GoCardless/Stripe cards, toggles, API keys, fee rates, label/desc inputs, System Config without payment block, Customer Payment Methods column with chips, payment filter dropdown, customer edit dialog payment checkboxes, Email Templates TipTap editor with 3 tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: CustomersTab.tsx: `handlePaymentToggle` function (lines 93-103) is dead code - it uses the old `allow_bank_transfer`/`allow_card_payment` API fields and is never called from JSX. The new payment mode saving is handled by `handleCustomerEdit` with `allowed_payment_modes`. Recommend removing or updating this dead function.

EmailSection.tsx line 399: Internal heading 'Integrations' inside the Email section (for email provider setup) is fine - this is NOT the sidebar 'Integrations' tab (which was correctly removed). Just note for E1 that the word 'Integrations' still appears inside the Email section content as a sub-heading for Resend email provider.
(Pre-existing from iter43) currency_for_country() only supports US/CA - all other countries (GB, AU, NZ, etc.) get UNSUPPORTED currency.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Pre-existing test customer from iter43 (test-phase3-payment@example.com) was used for payment method tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 tests all architectural refactoring changes. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iter44_payments_refactor.py (23 tests). Key verified features: (1) Website sidebar has 'Payments' tab under Configuration, no 'Integrations' tab; (2) Payments section shows GoCardless/Stripe cards with enable toggles, checkout label/description inputs, API key fields, and fee rate settings; (3) System Config shows only Operations/Feature Flags/Zoho - no payment settings; (4) Customers table has 'Payment Methods' column with GoCardless/Stripe chips, payment filter dropdown has All/GoCardless/Stripe/Both/None options; (5) Customer edit dialog has 'GoCardless (Bank Transfer / Direct Debit)' and 'Stripe (Credit / Debit Card)' checkboxes; (6) Email Templates editor has 3 tabs: Rich Text (TipTap with B/I/H1/H2/H3/List/Link toolbar), HTML Source, Preview; (7) Backend correctly normalizes old 'bank_transfer'/'card' mode names to 'gocardless'/'stripe'. Email sending is MOCKED (goes to email_outbox). Admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!.
